cadence_note: DWD publishes no fixed release calendar for the CDC regional averages; the files are regenerated in place and carry an 'erstellt am' stamp in their header line. Monthly and seasonal area means gain a period a few days after it closes, the annual table a few days after year end, and the daily/kl station master list advances its bis_datum every day. A weekly full re-pull catches each of those within days of publication, and the corpus is small (~300KB across the four assets), so a longer cadence buys nothing.
